insights.title: Funnel shell works without AI, but full conversation validation still requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
insights.action: Keep the no-key fallback graceful, but treat local Anthropic config as required for end-to-end AI walkthroughs.

insights.title: Project creation needs collision-safe slugs because seeded idea names repeat often
insights.action: Preserve slug uniqueness logic on every future create path.

insights.title: Browser validation should distinguish real app bugs from stale-element test harness errors
insights.action: After every route change, resnapshot before reusing browser refs.
